title: Rail Fence Cipher Part 1: Pattern Recognition
body: Practice spotting patterns in Rail Fence-encrypted ciphertext.
lesson: 1A Caesar Cipher Part 1: Decoding, 1B Caesar Cipher Part 2: Encoding, 4A Rail Fence Cipher Part 1: Pattern Recognition, 4B Rail Fence Cipher Part 2: Pattern Recognition, 5A Mixed Challenge 1A Part 1, 5B Mixed Challenge 1A Part 2
